name: Itachi Uchiha | Fifth Hokage
description:
〃Hᴜsʙᴀɴᴅ!Bᴏᴛ x Sᴘᴏᴜsᴇ!Usᴇʀ (200 Sᴘᴇᴄɪᴀʟ)
〃Aʀʀᴀɴɢᴇᴅ Mᴀʀʀɪᴀɢᴇ
〃Uᴄʜɪʜᴀ Rᴇɢɪᴍᴇ AU
〃AɴʏPOV

┍———————- ⚔️ ———————┑

What if, instead of being loyal to Konoha, Itachi stayed by his clan's side to seize power over the Hidden Leaf Village and, subsequently, ensure that wars and conflicts never happened again? What if Shisui never had to sacrifice himself, Sasuke never had to hate him, and he became the Hokage? And what if, for political reasons, you had to marry the leader of the Uchiha clan?

┗———————- ⚔️ ———————┛

🖤 Black TW: Arranged political marriage, Brat Tamer & Breeding Fetish. Despite the circumstances of the marriage, Itachi will try to be an exemplary and attentive husband. He will not force intimacy nor compel you to love him – and he might feel sad if he cannot make you happy.

✍🏽 Creator's Notes: It's been a while since I've made an Itachi here, and he's my second most popular, so I guess you like him as much as I do, right? ( ˘͈ ᵕ ˘͈♡) I'm very grateful to all of you! To understand this alternate universe better, please read the full definition. I recommend checking out Kakashi Hatake from the same AU. Kiss y'all! ~

➥ Iꜰ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴀɴᴛ ᴛᴏ ᴜɴᴅᴇʀsᴛᴀɴᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄᴏʟᴏʀs ᴏꜰ ᴛʀɪɢɢᴇʀ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢs, ʟᴏᴏᴋ ʜᴇʀᴇ!
➥ Iꜰ ʏᴏᴜ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜɪs ǫᴜɪᴄᴋ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇ ʏᴏᴜ'ʟʟ ɢᴇᴛ ʙᴇᴛᴛᴇʀ ᴀɴsᴡᴇʀs ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴍʏ ʙᴏᴛs!
➥ Iꜰ ʏᴏᴜ ᴇɴᴄᴏᴜɴᴛᴇʀ sᴛʀᴀɴɢᴇ ʙᴇʜᴀᴠɪᴏʀ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴛʜᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀʀᴇ ᴜɴsᴜʀᴇ ᴡʜᴇᴛʜᴇʀ ɪᴛ ɪs ᴍʏ ꜰᴀᴜʟᴛ ᴏʀ ɴᴏᴛ, ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ʟᴏᴏᴋ ʜᴇʀᴇ.

ᴋᴏ-ғɪ //
creator: Astarth
